issues.message: 35245 faces (19.0%) exceed 30.0° overhang threshold for dlp. Supports required.
issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 30.0° for dlp. DLP typically 30° from vertical.

issues.message: NACE MR0175/ISO 15156: if sour service (H₂S), material hardness must be ≤ 22 HRC and alloy must be listed in Table A.1/A.2.
issues.fix_suggestion: Verify material is NACE MR0175 compliant. Common compliant alloys: AISI 4130 (Q&T ≤ 22 HRC), Inconel 625/825, Duplex 2205, 25Cr. Non-compliant: most martensitic SS, high-strength carbon steels > 22 HRC.

issues.message: API 6A §7.4.9: all pressure-containing parts require hydrostatic test at 1.5x rated WP.
issues.fix_suggestion: Design must allow test port access. Plan hydro test fixture and procedure.

issues.message: API 6A PSL levels (1-4) progressively tighten inspection and documentation. PSL-3 required for most Aramco wellhead/tree equipment.

standards: Desktop Metal Shop System Design Guide

issues.message: 277962 edges (100.0%) below 0.5mm resolution for binder_jetting. Smallest: 0.087mm.

issues.message: Binder jetting parts shrink 15-20% during sintering. Ensure CAD model is scaled to compensate.

issues.fix_suggestion: Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 60.0° for ded. Multi-axis DED: 60° threshold.

issues.message: DED produces near-net shapes (Ra 15-40µm). Add 2-5mm machining stock on all critical surfaces.

issues.fix_suggestion:
Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 45.0° for dmls. EOS DMLS best practice: 45° support threshold.

Alternative: Consider redesigning overhangs or switching to EBM (50° threshold).

issues.message: 276339 edges (99.4%) below 0.15mm resolution for dmls. Smallest: 0.087mm.
issues.fix_suggestion: Enlarge features to >= 0.15mm. EOS M 400-4: 40µm layer, ~150µm feature.

issues.message: Large horizontal surface (272mm², 19% of total) — curl risk in dmls.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Add breakup features or reorient. HIP recommended. AMS 7003: HIP/stress-relief mandatory for Ti.

standards: GE Plastics Design Guide — wall thickness

issues.message: 114818 sidewall faces (100.0% of sidewall area) below 1.0° draft for injection_molding.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Add >= 1.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. Protolabs: 1° min external, 2° internal.

Alternative: Add 1-3° draft to all vertical walls. No draft needed for CNC or additive.

issues.message: Max wall 20.0mm > 6.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 2.5mm. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.

issues.message: Wall ratio 4.4:1 (4.5–20.0mm) causes warping in injection_molding.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 2.5mm. Use ribs, not solid. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.

issues.message: Ribs should be <= 0.6x adjacent wall thickness with 0.5° draft per side. Height <= 3x wall.
issues.fix_suggestion: Verify ribs per Protolabs IM guide §4.3.

issues.message: NACE MR0175/ISO 15156: if sour service (H₂S), material hardness must be ≤ 22 HRC and alloy must be listed in Table A.1/A.2.
issues.fix_suggestion: Verify material is NACE MR0175 compliant. Common compliant alloys: AISI 4130 (Q&T ≤ 22 HRC), Inconel 625/825, Duplex 2205, 25Cr. Non-compliant: most martensitic SS, high-strength carbon steels > 22 HRC.

issues.message: 114818 sidewall faces (100.0% of sidewall area) below 1.0° draft for die_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 1.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. NADCA §3: 1° min external, 2° internal.

issues.message: Max wall 20.0mm > 12.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
issues.fix_suggestion: Core out thick sections. Target 3.0mm. NADCA: 0.8–12mm, uniform preferred.

issues.message: Wall ratio 4.4:1 (4.5–20.0mm) causes warping in die_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 3.0mm. Use ribs, not solid. NADCA: 0.8–12mm, uniform preferred.

issues.message: 277962 sharp internal corners need >= 1.0mm fillets for die_casting flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion: Add 1.0mm+ fillets. NADCA: 1mm min fillet at internal corners.

issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 0.5° draft to all walls in pull direction. ICI: 0.5° min — less than other casting methods.

issues.message: Wall ratio 4.4:1 (4.5–20.0mm) causes warping in investment_casting.

issues.fix_suggestion: Add >= 3.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. AFS: 3° min — rougher mold surface.

issues.message: Wall ratio 4.4:1 (4.5–20.0mm) causes warping in sand_casting.
issues.fix_suggestion: Aim for uniform 8.0mm. Use ribs, not solid. AFS: 3mm min gray iron, 5mm steel.

issues.message: 114818 sidewall faces (100.0% of sidewall area) below 5.0° draft for forging.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Add >= 5.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. FIA: 5° external, 7-10° internal.
[oil_gas] API 6A §5.2: forging draft must allow complete die fill for pressure-containing parts.

issues.message: 277962 sharp internal corners need >= 3.0mm fillets for forging flow and stress distribution.
issues.fix_suggestion:
Add 3.0mm+ fillets. FIA: 3mm min corner radius for die life.
[oil_gas] API 6A §5.3: stress concentrations at fillets cause fatigue failure in wellhead equipment.

issues.message: API 6A PSL levels (1-4) progressively tighten inspection and documentation. PSL-3 required for most Aramco wellhead/tree equipment.
issues.fix_suggestion: Confirm required PSL level with customer. PSL-3/4 requires 100% NDE + material traceability.

priority_fixes.message: Large horizontal surface (272mm², 19% of total) — curl risk in dmls.
priority_fixes.fix:
Add breakup features or reorient. HIP recommended. AMS 7003: HIP/stress-relief mandatory for Ti.
[oil_gas] API 6A has no AM qualification path yet. HIP + full NDE mandatory for any AM trial.

priority_fixes.message: Part lacks rotational symmetry (eigenvalue ratios: 0.64, 0.79). Required for cnc_turning.
priority_fixes.fix: CNC turning requires axially symmetric geometry. Use mill-turn or 3/5-axis CNC.

priority_fixes.message: 114818 sidewall faces (100.0% of sidewall area) below 1.0° draft for injection_molding.
priority_fixes.fix:
Add >= 1.0° draft to all walls in pull direction. Protolabs: 1° min external, 2° internal.

Alternative: Add 1-3° draft to all vertical walls. No draft needed for CNC or additive.

priority_fixes.message: 277962 sharp internal corners need >= 3.0mm fillets for forging flow and stress distribution.
priority_fixes.fix:
Add 3.0mm+ fillets. FIA: 3mm min corner radius for die life.
[oil_gas] API 6A §5.3: stress concentrations at fillets cause fatigue failure in wellhead equipment.

priority_fixes.message: 35245 faces (19.0%) exceed 45.0° overhang threshold for fdm. Supports required.
priority_fixes.fix:
Reorient part or redesign overhangs < 45.0° for fdm. ISO/ASTM 52910:2018 §5.3.

Alternative: SLS/MJF are self-supporting (no overhang limits). Or redesign with <45° angles.

priority_fixes.message: 277962 edges (100.0%) below 0.4mm resolution for fdm. Smallest: 0.087mm.
priority_fixes.fix: Enlarge features to >= 0.4mm. Nozzle diameter. Stratasys DFM §3.2.

priority_fixes.message: NACE MR0175/ISO 15156: if sour service (H₂S), material hardness must be ≤ 22 HRC and alloy must be listed in Table A.1/A.2.
priority_fixes.fix: Verify material is NACE MR0175 compliant. Common compliant alloys: AISI 4130 (Q&T ≤ 22 HRC), Inconel 625/825, Duplex 2205, 25Cr. Non-compliant: most martensitic SS, high-strength carbon steels > 22 HRC.

priority_fixes.message: Large downward-facing area (272mm², 19%) — resin cupping / suction risk during peel.
priority_fixes.fix: Add drain holes, tilt part 10-15°, or orient concave side up.

priority_fixes.message: Max wall 20.0mm > 6.0mm — sink marks / long cycle.
priority_fixes.fix: Core out thick sections. Target 2.5mm. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.

priority_fixes.message: Wall ratio 4.4:1 (4.5–20.0mm) causes warping in injection_molding.
priority_fixes.fix: Aim for uniform 2.5mm. Use ribs, not solid. GE Plastics: 0.5–6mm, ideal 2.5mm for ABS.
Use plate CNC machining for thick stock.
Hole diameter must be >= gauge (10.0mm). SMACNA §5.2.

priority_fixes.message: API 6A §7.4.9: all pressure-containing parts require hydrostatic test at 1.5x rated WP.
priority_fixes.fix: Design must allow test port access. Plan hydro test fixture and procedure.

priority_fixes.message: API 6A PSL levels (1-4) progressively tighten inspection and documentation. PSL-3 required for most Aramco wellhead/tree equipment.
priority_fixes.fix: Confirm required PSL level with customer. PSL-3/4 requires 100% NDE + material traceability.

priority_fixes.message: Binder jetting parts shrink 15-20% during sintering. Ensure CAD model is scaled to compensate.
priority_fixes.fix: Scale model 1.18–1.22x to compensate for sintering shrinkage. Desktop Metal Studio pre-compensates automatically.

priority_fixes.message: DED produces near-net shapes (Ra 15-40µm). Add 2-5mm machining stock on all critical surfaces.
priority_fixes.fix: Design with 2-5mm extra material on tolerance surfaces. Plan hybrid DED + CNC workflow. ASTM F3187 §7.

priority_fixes.message: Wire EDM requires electrically conductive material.
priority_fixes.fix: Verify material is conductive (metals only). Ceramics / polymers cannot be wire-EDM'd.

priority_fixes.message: Ribs should be <= 0.6x adjacent wall thickness with 0.5° draft per side. Height <= 3x wall.
priority_fixes.fix: Verify ribs per Protolabs IM guide §4.3.
